# zenpng public API — additions from non-default features
# features: avx512,cms,imagequant,joint,quantette,quantize,unchecked,zencodec,zopfli
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

#
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)         2
#   inherent methods                            8
#   struct fields                               8
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)         8
#   auto-trait-complete types                   2

#   (root)                           18

## items (18 lines)

pub struct ImagequantQuantizer
pub ImagequantQuantizer::dithering: f32
pub ImagequantQuantizer::max_colors: u16
pub ImagequantQuantizer::max_quality: u8
pub ImagequantQuantizer::speed: i32
pub fn ImagequantQuantizer::with_dithering(self, f32) -> Self
pub fn ImagequantQuantizer::with_max_colors(self, u16) -> Self
pub fn ImagequantQuantizer::with_max_quality(self, u8) -> Self
pub fn ImagequantQuantizer::with_speed(self, i32) -> Self
pub struct QuantetteQuantizer
pub QuantetteQuantizer::dithering: bool
pub QuantetteQuantizer::kmeans: bool
pub QuantetteQuantizer::max_colors: u16
pub QuantetteQuantizer::sampling_factor: f32
pub fn QuantetteQuantizer::with_dithering(self, bool) -> Self
pub fn QuantetteQuantizer::with_kmeans(self, bool) -> Self
pub fn QuantetteQuantizer::with_max_colors(self, u16) -> Self
pub fn QuantetteQuantizer::with_sampling_factor(self, f32) -> Self

## trait impls (2 types)
